title: Serilis: Technological Ascendance
description: Serilis is an ambitious tech and progression mod, starting from the stone age and possibly ending to the space age. A world to fight and adapt to, flint tools, engineering, machines, vehicles, clockwork, steam technology, dieselpunk, and more.
body:
Serilis is an ambitious tech and progression mod, starting from the stone age and possibly ending to the space age.
A world to fight and adapt to, flint tools, engineering, machines, vehicles, clockwork, steam technology, dieselpunk, and more, although these are just ambitions, shall you join us in exploring the potential of this mod? goals achieved: Stone Age

  • Flint tools
devlog:
